description_long: This house complex features several modern, single-story residences arranged along intersecting paved roads, with each house surrounded by landscaped yards, trees, and driveways. The buildings have flat or gently sloped roofs, large windows, and open patios, with some properties enclosed by wooden or hedge fences. The exteriors are finished in neutral tones, primarily white and gray, with accents of wood and greenery. The layout includes driveways, garages, and visible walkways leading to the main entrances, which are often sheltered by overhangs or small porches. The scene is set in a suburban neighborhood context, with ample space between houses and a mix of private and communal green areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary architectural style.
description: A group of modern, single-story houses with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped yards, arranged along intersecting roads in a suburban neighborhood. The exteriors feature neutral colors, wood accents, and open patios, with driveways and garages visible.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facades of several houses, showing driveways, garages, and landscaped yards with trees and fences.
description_view_1: From this angle, the side and rear yards of the houses are visible, with more emphasis on the fenced areas and green spaces.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the back sides of the houses, including patios, gardens, and the arrangement of trees and fences.
description_view_3: This view provides a look at the opposite side of the houses, focusing on the garages, driveways, and additional yard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small porches or overhangs, and are often accessed via paved walkways or driveways.
